description: Improve DocumentTable with sticky headers, resizable columns, ellipsis, zebra striping, cell popover, server-side sorting, and enhanced pagination.

userStories.title: Sticky headers and zebra striping
userStories.description: As a user, I want table headers to stay visible when scrolling and alternating row colors for easier scanning.
acceptanceCriteria: Table wrapper in table.tsx has overflow removed (just 'relative w-full') so sticky resolves against DocumentTable's outer scroll container
TableHeader has 'sticky top-0 z-10 bg-background' class in DocumentTable
Body TableRows have 'even:bg-muted/30' for zebra striping
Scrolling vertically keeps headers pinned at top
Horizontal scrolling still works via outer div
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Pure CSS changes. Modify table.tsx (remove overflow-auto from wrapper div) and DocumentTable.tsx (add sticky + zebra classes).

userStories.title: Table-layout fixed, ellipsis, and resizable columns
userStories.description: As a user, I want cell content on a single line with ellipsis and the ability to drag column edges to resize.
acceptanceCriteria: table element has table-layout: fixed
Each td contains a span with 'block truncate' (overflow-hidden text-ellipsis whitespace-nowrap)
td itself is 'overflow-visible relative' so popover icon is not clipped
th has whitespace-nowrap and padding-right for resize handle
Thin drag handle div (4px wide, full height, cursor-col-resize) at right edge of each th
Dragging handle resizes column via mousemove/mouseup on document
user-select: none set on body during drag
Resize handle onClick has e.stopPropagation() to not trigger sort
No initial pixel widths - table-layout fixed distributes equally by default
columnWidths state only tracks columns user has resized
columnWidths reset when columns array changes (different collection/query)
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Coupled with ellipsis since both require table-layout: fixed. Track columnWidths in local useState. useEffect to reset on column change.

userStories.title: Cell popover with copy
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click an expand icon on a cell to see the full untruncated value in a popover with a copy button.
acceptanceCriteria: @radix-ui/react-popover installed
Shadcn-style popover.tsx wrapper created at src/renderer/src/components/ui/popover.tsx
Each td has 'relative group' class
Expand icon (lucide Maximize2, 14px) appears on cell hover via opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100
Icon onClick calls e.stopPropagation() to prevent row click
Clicking icon opens Radix Popover anchored to cell
Popover shows full untruncated value with word-wrap and a Copy button
Copy button writes to clipboard and shows sonner toast
Popover dismisses on click outside or Escape
Raw cell value passed through for both truncated display and full copy
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: npm install @radix-ui/react-popover. Create ui/popover.tsx following existing shadcn pattern (like table.tsx).

userStories.title: Server-side column sorting
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click column headers to sort results via MongoDB so sorting is accurate across all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Store has 'sort: Record<string, 1 | -1> | null' state (default null)
Store has setSort(field) action: new field sets {field: 1}, same field cycles asc->desc->null
setSort resets skip to 0 and calls fetchPage
sort passed in all find() calls: fetchPage, selectCollection, runQuery, refreshDocs
sort cleared on selectCollection and runQuery
th click calls setSort(col) with sort indicator icons (ArrowUp/ArrowDown/ArrowUpDown)
Sort headers disabled (no click, no cursor) when queryMode is aggregate
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Backend already supports sort in FindOpts and mongo-service.ts applies cursor.sort(). Just need to wire through store and UI.

userStories.title: Pagination: jump-to-page and page size selector
userStories.description: As a user, I want to jump to a specific page and change the number of rows per page.
acceptanceCriteria: Store has setLimit(newLimit) action that updates limit, resets skip to 0, and refetches
Pagination bar layout: [Prev] [Page <input> of Y] [rows/page <select>] [Next]
Page input is type=number, applies on Enter or blur, clamps to valid range (1 to totalPages)
Page size select has options: 10, 20, 50, 100
Changing page size refetches with new limit
Invalid page numbers (0, negative, > totalPages) are clamped
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Add setLimit to store. Rework pagination bar in DocumentTable.
